name: Akuma no Oni (coop)
text:
Corrupted. No non-[shadow] attachments.
Reaction: After you collect fate in the dynasty phase, each opponent chooses a non-[shadow] character with three or lower [mil] skill – bow each chosen character.

name: Akuma no Oni
text:
Corrupted. No non-[shadow] attachments.
Action: Choose a character. Its controller selects one – either remove all fate from that character or you may declare an additional [mil] conflict this phase.

name: The Obsidian Flower (coop)
text:
Corrupted. No non-[shadow] attachments.
Reaction: After you collect fate in the dynasty phase – each opponent taints a character they control.

name: The Obsidian Flower
text:
Corrupted. No non-[shadow] attachments.
Action: Choose a tainted character an opponent controls. Its controller selects one – either each opponent loses 2 honor, or you gain control of the chosen character and it gains a [shadow] clan symbol.

name: Atsuko the Calamitous (coop)
text:
Corrupted. No non-[shadow] attachments.
Reaction: After you collect fate in the dynasty phase – remove 2 random cards in each opponent's dynasty discard pile from the game. Bow each character in play with the same name as a card removed from the game this way.

name: Atsuko the Calamitous
text:
Corrupted. No non-[shadow] attachments.
Reaction: Choose an opponent to select one – either that player sacrifices a character, or you play a character from your dynasty discard pile as if it were in your hand, reducing its cost by 2.

name: Blood Fields
text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province – remove 1 fate from each attacking character.

name: Defiled Cavern
text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province – place 2 (per opponent) random characters in your dynasty discard pile on the bottom of your dynasty deck.

name: Fallen Chrysanthemum Lake
text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province – each opponent discards their hand and draws that many cards.

name: False Lantern Grove
text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province, choose an unclaimed ring – resolve the contested ring's effect and claim it. The chosen ring is now the contested ring.

name: Forgotten Tomb of Fu Leng
text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province, choose a character in your dynasty discard pile – put that character into play in the conflict as a defender. Place 1 (per opponent) fate on it.

name: Garden of Corruption
text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province – dishonor each attacking tainted character, then taint each attacking character.

name: Haunted Jungles
text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province, choose up to 1 (per opponent) characters in your provinces – put those characters into play in the conflict as defenders.

name: Maddening Emptiness
text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province, choose up to 1 attacking character controlled by each opponent – bow each chosen character.

name: Sea of Shadows
text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province, choose up to 1 ready character in each opponent's home – move each of those characters to the conflict.

name: Spectral Watchtower
text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province – take 1 fate from each opponent.

name: Fouleye's Elite
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a character an opponent controls with equal or lower [mil] skill than this character – bow the chosen character.

name: Goblin Hovel
text: Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends, choose up to 3 different [shadow] Goblin characters – move 1 fate from your fate pool to each chosen character.

name: Detritus Priest
text: Reaction: After a Goblin you control wins a conflict, remove 1 fate from it – resolve the contested ring's effect. (Limit twice per round.)

name: Chieftain Fouleye
text:
Reduce the cost to play each [shadow] Goblin by 1.
Each other [shadow] Goblin gets +2[pol].

name: Skeletal Warrior
text: Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.)

name: Endless Ranks
text:
Corrupted. No attachments except Weapon.
Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a character in your dynasty discard pile - put that character on top of your dynasty deck.

name: Killing Field
text: Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends – discard each card from each opponent's provinces.

name: Undead Horror
text:
Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.)
Reaction: After this character wins a conflict – attach a random character in each opponent's discard pile to this character as an attachment, treating its printed text box as if it were blank. That card gains the text: "Add this card's printed [mil] and [pol] skill values to those of attached character."

name: Kitsu Sokori
text: Reaction: After fate is removed from this character, choose a character in an opponent's dynasty discard pile – put that character into play under your control, tainted. It gains the [shadow] clan symbol. While this character is in play, that character cannot leave play. Discard that character when this character leaves play.

name: Lost Samurai
text:
Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.)
Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a participating non-[shadow] character – dishonor that character.

name: Onikage Rider
text:
Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.)
Reaction: After this character wins a conflict – discard each card in each opponent's provinces.

name: Dark Moto
text:
Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.)
Reaction: After this character wins a conflict – move 1 fate from your fate pool to it. It does not bow as a result of this conflict's resolution.

name: Moto Tsume
text:
Corrupted. No non-[shadow] attachments.
Reaction: After this character is declared as an attacker – honor each attacking character.

name: Thundering Tide Keep
text: Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends – gain 2 fate for each opponent. This ability triggers before each other [shadow] holding's interrupt.

name: Scavenging Goblin
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict – remove the top 3 cards of each opponent's conflict deck from the game. Then, remove from the game each attachment you do not control if it shares a name with a card removed by this effect.

name: Penanggalan
text:
Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.)
Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a tainted participating character an opponent controls – move 1 fate from that character to this character.

name: The Butcher of Ishigaki
text:
Corrupted. No non-[shadow] attachments.
While this character is attacking, at least one character controlled by each opponent must be declared as a defender, if able.

name: Oni Lair
text: Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends, spend up to 4 fate – put that many random cards in your dynasty discard pile on the bottom of your dynasty deck in a random order.

name: Shambling Servant
text:
Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.)
Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a participating character – taint the chosen character.

name: Insatiable Gaki
text:
Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.)
Reaction: After this character wins a conflict – each opponent discards 1 card from their hand.

name: Haunted Ruins
text: Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends – each opponent loses 1 honor.

name: Chuda Gyushi
text: Reaction: After fate is removed from this character, each opponent selects one – they must either lose 3 honor, discard 2 random cards from their hand or sacrifice a character.

name: Oni of Obsidian and Blood
text:
Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.)
Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose an opponent's tainted character – discard that character.

name: Shrine to Jigoku
text: Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends, spend up to 2 fate – for each fate spent this way, each opponent discards 1 random card from their hand.

name: Bloodthirsty Kansen
text:
Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.)
Reaction: After this character wins a conflict – resolve the contested ring's effect.

name: Bog Hag
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict – each opponent discards the top 8 cards of their conflict deck.

name: Prakhara the Schemer
text:
Corrupted. No non-[shadow] attachments.
Interrupt: When the effects of an opponent's event would initiate, spend 1 fate – cancel those effects. (Limit twice per round.)

name: Gashadokuro
text:
Corrupted. No non-[shadow] attachments.
This character cannot be evaded by the covert keyword.
Reaction: After an opponent declares a [mil] conflict against one of your provinces – ready this character.

name: Power of Jigoku
text: Action: Choose a participating ready [shadow] character – until the end of the conflict, that character gets +5[mil] and cannot be bowed or moved home by opponents' card effects.

name: Blade of Chaos
text:
Attach to a [shadow] character.
Reaction: After you play this card – take another action after this one.

name: Horrific Scarring
text:
Attach to an opponent's character. Other [shadow] attachments cannot be played on attached character.
Attached character cannot participate in [pol] conflicts.

name: Violence and Evil
text: Action: If the current conflict is [pol], switch the conflict type. Otherwise, choose up to 2 non-[shadow] attachments on participating characters and discard them.

name: The Wall is Breached
text:
This event's effects cannot be canceled.
Action: If you are attacking and count more current [mil] skill in the conflict than your opponent – break each attacked non-stronghold province.

name: Way of the Shadowlands
text: Action: Choose a participating character – taint that character. If it is not a [shadow] character, you may spend 1 fate to bow it.

name: Tendrils of Corruption
text:
Attach to a [shadow] character.
Reaction: After you play this card, choose a participating character – taint it.

name: Drawn to Blood
text: Action: If the attacked province is tainted, resolve the contested ring's effect. Otherwise, taint each attacked province.

name: Death After Life
text: Action: Choose a character in your dynasty discard pile with the highest printed cost among characters in your dynasty discard pile - put that character into play in the conflict, tainted.

name: At His Command
text:
This event's effects cannot be canceled.
Action: Select one – either place 1 fate on each character you control, or put your warlord into play in the conflict with 3 fate on it.

name: Evil Portents
text: Action: Until the end of the conflict, each participating tainted [shadow] characters gets +2[mil] and +2[pol] and each participating tainted non-[shadow] characters gets -2[mil] and -2[pol].

name: Uncontained
text: Action: Choose a character you control in your home – move it to the conflict. If it is bowed, you may spend 1 fate to ready it.

name: Unending Hatred
text:
Attach to a [shadow] character.
Reaction: After you play this card – place 1 fate on attached character.

name: Direct Assault
text: Action: Put your warlord into play in the conflict. You may move up to 2 fate from your fate pool to it.

name: Dark Brother's Blade
text:
Attach to a [shadow] character.
While you are playing challenge mode, this card gains ancestral.
While attached character is unique, it gains: "Reaction: After this character wins a conflict – each opponent must sacrifice a participating character."

name: Dark Bargain
text: Action: For each ready participating character an opponent controls, that character's controller selects one – they must either bow that character or lose 1 honor. Then, taint each ready participating character each opponent controls.

name: Lurking Treachery
text:
Attach to an opponent's character. Other [shadow] attachments cannot be played on attached character.
Interrupt: When attached character leaves play, its controller chooses one of their unbroken provinces – taint that province.

name: Permeating Mutation
text:
Attach to a [shadow] character.
Reaction: After you play this card – play an attachment from your discard pile.

name: Consumed By Evil
text: Action: Choose a tainted character you do not control. That character's controller selects one – either they sacrifice that character, or you put your warlord into play in the conflict with 1 fate on it.

name: Blasphemous Act
text:
This event's effects cannot be canceled.
Action: Bow each tainted character you do not control and ready each tainted character you control. Each tainted character you control does not bow as a result of this conflict's resolution.

name: Spiritual Isolation
text:
Attach to an opponent's character. Other [shadow] attachments cannot be played on attached character.
Treat attached character's printed text box as if it were blank (except for Traits).

name: Shameful Affliction
text: Action: Choose a participating non-[shadow] character – dishonor that character. You may spend 1 fate to resolve this ability twice.

name: Despair
text:
Increase the cost of each event an opponent plays in this conflict by 1.
While playing challenge mode, this card gains: "Interrupt: When the effects of an event would initiate – cancel those effects."

name: Madness
text:
Attach to an opponent's character.
Attached character cannot have other attachments.

name: Duty's Cost
text:
This event's effects cannot be canceled.
Action: Each opponent must select one – either taint each of your unbroken provinces or reveal your hand and discard each card with printed cost 0 from it.

name: Obsidian Shard
text:
Attach to a [shadow] character.
Reaction: After you play this card, choose a non-[shadow] attachment on a participating character or on the attacked province – discard that attachment.

name: Exploit Weakness
text: Action: Choose a participating non-[shadow] character with printed cost 2 or lower – if that character is tainted, gain control of it and it gains a [shadow] clan symbol. Otherwise, bow and dishonor it.

name: Tainted Wasteland
text:
Attach to an unbroken province.
Attached province gets +1 strength (+4 strength instead if it is tainted).
Forced Reaction: After a conflict is declared against attached province – each opponent loses 1 honor.

name: In Service to Shadow
text: Action: Bow a participating non-unique (friendly) [shadow] character – put your warlord into play in the conflict. Then, move all fate and attachments from the bowed character to your warlord.

name: The First War
text:
This event's effects cannot be canceled.
Action: Resolve the conflict as if both teams had passed consecutively.

name: Twin Soul Temple
text: Action: Bow this stronghold. Choose an element symbol on a card in play – replace that symbol with the symbol of a different element until the end of the phase.

name: Shiro Yogo
text: Action: Bow this stronghold. Choose a dishonored character – abilities on that character cannot be triggered this phase.

name: Exiled Guardian
text:
Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.)
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Action: Sacrifice this character. Choose a status token on a character or province – discard that status token.

name: Hida Backbreaker
text:
No opponents' attachments.
Reaction: After this character wins a [mil] conflict, choose an opponent's participating character – dishonor that character.

name: Third Tower
text:
Limit 1 per deck.
Reaction: After an opponent declares a conflict against a province you control that does not contain a Kaiu Wall holding – take 1 honor from that opponent. (Unlimited.)

name: Iron Warrior Vanguard
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a character – honor that character.

name: Daidoji Strategist
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose an honored character – move that character home.

name: Discerning Yoriki
text:
Courtesy. (When this character leaves play, gain 1 fate.)
Reaction: After you look at 1 or more cards in an opponent's hand (or those are revealed), choose a character – honor it.

name: Togashi Dreamer
text:
Support.
Reaction: After you play a Kihō event during a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character with 1 or more status tokens on it and choose an unclaimed ring – move 1 fate from the chosen character to the chosen ring.

name: Teacher of Empty Thought
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, if you have played 3 or more cards during this conflict – draw 1 card.

name: Revered Bonshō
text: When fate would be removed from characters during the fate phase, instead distribute that fate among unclaimed rings as evenly as possible.

name: Field Tactician
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Reaction: After you play a Tactic card, choose a card in any player's conflict discard pile – place it into that player's conflict deck third from the top.

name: Akodo Mastermind
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, remove 1 or more Tactic cards in your conflict discard pile from the game. Choose a participating character with glory equal to or lower than the number of removed cards - bow that character.

name: Void Wielder
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Action: During a [void] conflict, choose a participating character. That character's controller selects one – either discard a status token from it, move it home or discard an attachment on it.

name: Isawa Skycaller
text: During [air] conflicts you may play characters in your provinces as if they were in your hand. Characters played this way must be played into the conflict.

name: Disciple of Deception
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Action: During a conflict, choose 2 different status tokens on 2 different characters – treat one of the chosen status tokens as if it were the other until the end of the conflict.

name: Loyal Oathbreaker
text: You are considered to be less honorable than each opponent.

name: Silent Enforcer
text: Reaction: After you play an event during a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character with printed cost 3 or lower. Its controller selects one – either bow that character or move it home.

name: Reckless Avenger
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Action: Each player in turn order may choose a character they control - ready the first chosen character, honor the second chosen character, and taint each other chosen character.

name: Seasoned Patroller
text: While this character is attacking, the attacked province's strength cannot be increased. (This includes by holdings, strongholds, attachments, lasting effects and status tokens.)

name: Moto Beastmaster
text: Reaction: After this character is declared as an attacker, choose a character with printed cost 2 or lower in your provinces (printed cost 4 or lower instead if you are first player) – put that character into play in the conflict.

name: Fearless Sailor
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Action: During a conflict, in which this character is participating, choose a participating character with 1 or more status tokens on it – that character gets -2[mil] until the end of the conflict.

name: Oni Tyrant
text:
Corrupted. (This character enters play tainted.)
Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, lose 1 honor. Choose a [shadow] character you own from outside the game with printed cost 2 or lower – put that character into play in the conflict. When it would leave play, remove it from the game instead.

name: Audience Chamber
text: Reaction: After you play a character with printed cost 4 or higher – place 1 fate on it.

name: Jade Talisman
text:
Attach to a character you control.
Interrupt: When a ring effect would initiate, if it chooses attached character as a target, sacrifice this attachment – cancel that ring effect.

name: Jade-Inlaid Katana
text:
Attach to a character you control.
Attached character gains: "Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose a participating character with 1 or more status tokens on it – remove 1 fate from that character."

name: Jade Strike
text:
Play only if you control a Shugenja character.
Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character with 1 or more status tokens on it – set its base [mil] and [pol] skills to 0 until the end of the conflict. If that character is tainted, also remove 1 fate from it.

name: Preeminent Decree
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating Courtier character you control – for this conflict, each other participating character gets -X[pol], where X is the chosen Courtier's glory.

name: Resourcefulness
text: Action: Dishonor a (friendly) character. Choose a character – honor it.

name: Masashigi's Sacrifice
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Action: During a conflict, sacrifice a (friendly) character with 1 or more status tokens on it – each defending character does not bow as a result of this conflict's resolution.

name: Centered Breath
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating Monk character – You may trigger each ability printed on that character an additional time this round (or specified period). If you have played another Kihō in this conflict, take another action after this one.

name: Swell of Seafoam
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Action: During a conflict, choose a participating Monk character – that character does not bow as the result of this conflict's resolution. If you have played another Kihō in this conflict, also honor that character.

name: Prove Your Skill
text:
Play only if you are more honorable than an opponent.
Action: Choose a status token on a character – discard it.

name: Directing the Battle
text:
Support.
Action: During a conflict, choose a character. That character's controller selects one –
* move that character home.
* that character gets +3[mil] until the end of the conflict.
* that character can't be bowed by opponents' card effects during this conflict.

name: Peerless Discipline
text: Action: Until the end of the phase, each character you control gets +1[mil] and gains the Bushi trait.

name: Spell Scroll
text:
While attached character is participating in a conflict whose element matches one of attached character's Traits, it gets +3[pol].
Action: Choose a non-character card in your conflict discard pile that shares a Trait with attached character – add it to your hand and sacrifice this attachment.

name: Elemental Inversion
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a ring – move all fate from the chosen ring to the contested ring and switch them. (The chosen ring is now contested.)

name: Dance of Chikushō-dō
text:
Support. (Another player may help pay this card's fate cost.)
Action: Choose any number of non-[shadow] players – each of those players fills each of their unbroken non-stronghold provinces with 2 facedown dynasty cards. (Max 1 per round.)

name: Soshi's Memory
text: Action: Choose a player – that player searches the top X cards of their deck for a card and adds it to their hand, where X is the number of Shugenja characters you control. Shuffle.

name: Betrayed Vision
text:
Play only if you control a Shugenja character.
Support.
Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character an opponent controls and a different non-unique character – the participating character becomes a copy of the non-unique character until the end of the conflict.

name: Scarlet Sabre
text:
Restricted.
While you are the first player, attached character gains: "Reaction: After this character wins a conflict – your opponent loses 1 fate."

name: Daikyū
text:
Restricted. Support.
While you are the first player, attached character gets +2[mil].
Attached character gains: "Reaction: After a character either commits to or moves to a [mil] conflict this character is participating in, choose a participating character with lower [mil] skill than this character – bow it."

name: Defiance
text: Action: During a conflict, if you have fewer cards in hand than your opponent, choose a character – until the end of the conflict, that character gets +X[mil] and +X[pol], where X is your opponent's honor bid.

name: Exposed Secrets
text: Action: During a [pol] conflict, choose a participating character with [pol] skill equal to or lower than its controller's honor bid – bow that character.

name: Lurking Affliction
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character – taint it.

name: Way of the Warrior
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating Bushi character – until the end of the conflict, opponents' card effects cannot bow, move or dishonor that character. If it is bowed, ready it.

name: Accursed Summoning
text:
This card's fate cost can only be paid for with fate on character you control.
Action: During a conflict, lose X honor. Choose a non-unique [shadow] character you own from outside the game with printed cost X – put that character into play in the conflict. When it would leave play, remove it from the game instead.

name: Unveiled Corruption
text: Action: Taint a (friendly) unbroken province – each opponent discards cards from their hand, until they have an equal or fewer number of cards in their hand as you.
